/usr/bin/cc  -Wall -Wextra -Werror -D_POSIX_C_SOURCE=200809L CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/test_entry.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_task.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_mutex.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_file.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_network.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/osal/test_osal_signal.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/hal/test_hal_can.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/pdl/test_pdl_satellite.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/apps/test_can_gateway.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/src/apps/test_protocol_converter.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/apps/protocol_converter/src/payload_pdl.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/apps/protocol_converter/src/protocol_converter.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/apps/can_gateway/src/can_gateway.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/hal/src/linux/hal_can.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/hal/src/linux/hal_network.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/hal/src/linux/hal_serial.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_clock.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_error.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_file.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_heap.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_init.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_log.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_mutex.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_network.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_queue.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_signal.c.o CMakeFiles/unit-test.dir/__/osal/src/linux/osal_task.c.o -o ../../target/bin/unit-test  ../lib/libtest_runner.a ../lib/libpdl.a ../lib/libhal.a ../lib/libosal.a -lrt
